name: Shandong Weida Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Weida Machinery Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells drill chucks primarily in China. The company offers various types of drill chuks, including performance drill chucks, hand drill chucks, locking drill chucks, wrench drill chucks, self-tightening chucks, and trimming wheels and accessories; and saw blades. It also provides precision castings for power tools accessories, machining products, auto parts, hardware and tools, instrumentation valves, other foundry products, and die-casting products. In addition, the company offers powder metallurgy parts comprising structure parts, garden tools, electrical tools, bench drills, and oil bearing parts, as well as parts for use in small gasoline engine, appliances, and automotive applications. Further, it provides AC and DC switches; portable power supply products; and CNC machines. The company offers its products under the Peacock, Jiyi Machine, and DEMAC brands. Shandong Weida Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is based in Wendeng, China.
